retry_reason: refcount_inc is unconditional and never fails; no failure path exists, so retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: bpf_cpumask_acquire is a simple get-wrapper that acquires an additional reference on a bpf_cpumask object by incrementing its usage refcount via refcount_inc. The function returns the same pointer, transferring a reference to the caller. The caller must later release this reference by calling the corresponding put function (e.g., bpf_cpumask_release). The object is assumed to be alive at the time of the call; no error-checking is provided.
